summary: Iteration 16 - Story Thumbnail Support & Backward Compatibility Tests. Backend: 14/14 tests passed (100%). All requested features verified: story thumbnail support working, posts media_urls backward compatibility, user search without password leak, post deletion with owner authorization.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/users/search?q=mario - PASSED: Finds users without leaking password/password_hash fields
GET /api/posts - PASSED: All posts include media_urls array (backward compat working)
POST /api/posts with media_urls - PASSED: Creates carousel post with multiple images
GET /api/posts/{id} - PASSED: Single post has media_urls field
DELETE /api/posts/{post_id} as owner - PASSED: Returns 200 and deletes post
DELETE /api/posts/{post_id} as non-owner - PASSED: Returns 403 Forbidden
GET /api/stories - PASSED: Returns story groups with thumbnail field in each story
POST /api/stories with type=video - PASSED: Response includes thumbnail field
Story response structure verified with all required fields including thumbnail

success_rate.frontend: N/A (backend only testing requested - React Native app testable on user's iPhone)

seed_data_creation: Created test carousel posts and cleaned up TEST_iter16_ prefixed posts after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 backend features verified: 1) Story thumbnail support - GET /api/stories returns thumbnail field in each story, POST /api/stories (video) includes thumbnail in response 2) All posts include media_urls array for backward compatibility 3) User search excludes password fields 4) Post deletion returns 200 for owner, 403 for non-owner. Frontend is React Native Expo app - can only be tested on user's iPhone device.
